xml.introduction: The episode begins with all of the Candy People, along with Finn and Jake, dancing in the Candy Kingdom

line.dialogue: Candy Party! Jake! This party is so crazy!
I know, Finn! I know! Laughing
So, Finn... Do you have a girlfriend?
Oh, my gosh! I can't believe you just said that.
Laughing What a wonderful, marvelous party!
Okay. I'm gonna do it. Okay-okay-okay. Everyone watch! I'm gonna do a flip!

line.stage: Cinnamon Bun stumbles backward and hits his head on a tower wall, cracking it

line.dialogue: Oh no!

line.stage: The crack streaks upward toward the balcony where Princess Bubblegum is dancing
The tower crumbles and Princess Bubblegum falls

line.dialogue: Princess Bubblegum's in trouble!

line.stage: Finn runs towards the tower and bumps into a Candy Person

line.dialogue: Watch where you're going!

line.stage: Princess Bubblegum continues to fall towards the ground

line.dialogue: Ahhhhhhhhhh!

line.stage: Finn dives towards Bubblegum and catches her just before she hits the ground
The Candy People gasp and murmur

line.dialogue: Please! Calm yourselves, my people. I am safe! Oh, thank you, Finn. You truly are my hero this day.
Cool.
Pondering Hero... Hmmm... Heeeeerroooo... Hey, I just thought of something!
Uhh... What'd you think of?
I'll show you. Come on! We'll go through my secret entrance. To the Candy People Alright, everyone. Turn around.

line.stage: The Candy People and Jake stare blankly at Princess Bubblegum

line.dialogue: Whispering Well, turn around. This entrance is secret.
Oh.

line.stage: The Candy People and Jake turn around

line.dialogue: Pulling a brick out of a wall, exposing a hole Math. Hurry, Finn!
Laughing No way!

line.stage: Princess Bubblegum and Finn both dive into the hole in the wall
Finn reaches back out and pulls the brick in, covering the hole again

line.dialogue: Pulling a yellow globe out of a chest Here it is. Check it out.
A magical globe?
No, Finn. It's what you can see through the globe.

line.stage: An image of a book appears in the globe

line.dialogue: Golly!
Giggle Look. See this book?
Yeah, I see it!
It's called the Enchiridion. It's a book meant only for heroes whose hearts are righteous.
Shmow-zow!
The book lies at the top of Mount Cragdor, guarded by a manly minotaur. It's waiting for a truly righteous hero to claim it!
Do you think I've got the goods, Bubblegum? 'Cause I am in to this stuff!
Yeah, I know. And yes, I do.
Then off I go!

line.stage: Finn jumps out of a high tower window

line.dialogue: Jaaaaaaaaake!

line.stage: Jake stretches up to catch Finn

line.dialogue: Thanks, pal.
Waving Farewell, Fi—Oh, wait a minute... reaching into her belt, she pulls out a handkerchief and waves it Farewell, Finn the human boy!
Bye, Princess! To Jake You know what time it is, buddy?
Aaaaadventure time?
Yeah, man!

line.stage: The scene changes; Finn and Jake are now at a gate in a wall surrounding Mount Cragdor

line.character: Key-per: Greetings, young heroes to be. This mountain is called Cragdor. Its purpose is two-fold
line.dialogue: To protect the Enchiridion and to test the hearts of those who seek to possess it. Many noble challengers have entered the temple to pass the grueling trials that lie behind these walls, but no one has ever left here alive or dead! Only the truest most worthy hero can receive the heroes' Enchiridion and walk out these doors again! If it is you, friend, giggles and I cannot say that I am certain, but you are verily welcome to try; However, first you must pass my riddle. My name is Key-per, and duly so, for I carry the key to this door, but all is not how it appears, you see. Or perhaps you do not see at all. Giggles Perhaps the key is in you, child, but you cannot use your brawn here. The door is magically sealed.

line.stage: Finn picks up Key-per, shoves his head into the key-hole and turns him

line.dialogue: Oh ho! You've unlocked the riddle of the door. Laughing Brilliantly done, child! Please, reveal to me how you unraveled my clue.
I just thought you'd look cute stuffed in that lock.
Oh, yes. That's how most people get in.
Bye!
You've passed the first trial, young heroes, but prepare yourselves! To the camera For there are many trials ahead of you, and each trial is more treacherous than the last.
Sniffs Enchiridion is... sniffs more, points That way.
What?! Dude! You can't smell the book from here!
It's in the castle on top of the mountain. Sniffs In a room. Laughing and tapping his nose Wish you had one, huh?

line.stage: Finn hears the voices yelling for help

line.dialogue: Running towards the voices This way!
What about the book?
It can wait. Someone needs our help.

line.stage: Finn jumps over brambles and lands on his face

line.dialogue: Yo, Finn. Are you alright? Did you get brain damage?
I'm fine! Keep going! We have to hurry!

line.stage: Finn and Jake come up on three gnomes trapped in a lava pit. Finn reaches in and pulls them out

line.dialogue: I gotcha.
Thank you for saving us. Voice becomes menacing Now we can destroy this old lady!

line.stage: The gnomes fly towards an old lady who is tied to a stake

line.dialogue: La la la-la!
What?!

line.stage: The gnomes zap the old lady with magic and she disappears

line.dialogue: Every time you say "what" we'll destroy an old lady.
Shocked What?!

line.stage: The gnomes zap another old lady and she disappears

line.dialogue: Every time you say "no" we'll destroy an old lady.
Panicked No! Wai...

line.stage: The gnomes zap three more old ladies

line.dialogue: Please...

line.stage: The Red Gnome zaps an old lady

line.dialogue: Don't destroy...

line.stage: The Orange Gnome zaps an old lady

line.dialogue: Anymore...

line.stage: The Blue Gnome zaps an old lady

line.dialogue: Old women.
Every time you look sad we'll destroy a big old woman!
Well... Ever since I got the... Zapping sounds Ahhhh!
To other gnomes Hey, guys. Every time he's a big wuss, let's destroy an old lady.
Laughing Yeah!

line.stage: Finn runs off, distressed

line.dialogue: Hey! Back off, you gnomes! That kid just saved you guys! You should thank him, not destroy old ladies! Do you even know what I'm talking about? Say thank you! Say... Thank... You.
Kill him!

line.stage: The gnomes try zapping Jake with magic, but Jake twists his body and grabs the gnomes

line.dialogue: Shoving the gnomes back into the lava pit Get back in there!

line.stage: Jake walks towards Finn as the gnomes scream for help

line.dialogue: Hey, Finn. You okay?
No way, dude. Those old ladies are destroyed because of me. I'm not righteous. I'm wrongteous. Stupidteous.
Awww. Don't let those gnomes and their illusions get you down. They're just gnomes and illusions.
Illusions?
Yeah, man. Think. What would regular, old, sweet ladies be doing wandering the hills of Mount Cragdor?
Maybe they're lost?
Laughing No way. This place is designed to mess you up. To mess with your head. None of this is real. It's all just trials to test your heroic attributes.
Hmmm... Hmmm!
Now let's go get that book.
Yeah! You're the smartest dog I know, man.

line.stage: Jake laughs and then gets eaten by a giant ogre

line.dialogue: Jake? Jaaaaaaaake!
You cannot pass!
Gimme back my friend!
No!
Popping out of the ogre's nostril It's ok, Finn! I can get out!

line.stage: The ogre shoves his finger into his nostril, pushing Jake back inside

line.dialogue: Let Jake go, or I'll... kicking the ogre's foot I'll kick your foot!
Laughing It is impossible for you to hurt me!
Popping out of the ogre's ear and laughing Don't worry, dude! I found another way—oof!

line.stage: The ogre shoves his finger into his ear, pushing Jake back inside

line.dialogue: Huh? Starts climbing the ogre's leg I'm coming, buddy!
Long burp I think your dog finally fell into my stomach. Hey... Where'd you go?
Pulling a giant dollar out of the ogre's wallet I got your wallet, man!

line.stage: Finn grabs opposite edges of the dollar and glides away on it like a hang-glider

line.dialogue: No! My big money! Give it back!
Give me back my friend!
But I killed him already!
Crying Fine. Angry I'll give you your dollar. Yelling Here's your dollaaaaaarrrrr!

line.stage: Finn glides back towards the ogre and does a flying kick into the his stomach

line.dialogue: Oof!

line.stage: The ogre's stomach rumbles and oozes out his mouth
He retches and Jake comes out with it

line.dialogue: Whoa. Whoa. Whoa. Whoa-oa!
Gliding on the dollar towards Jake Jake! Grabbing Jake with his feet You're okay!
Laughingly Stomachs are weird.

line.stage: Finn uses the dollar to glide to the entrance of a stone temple near the top of the mountain

line.dialogue: Dude! You just flew us all the way to the top! Wait a minute. Sniff I can smell the book right through this door.
Crying in the distance You're under arrest for stealing my dollar! Crying again
Just a minute, Jake.

line.stage: Finn folds the dollar into a paper airplane and launches it towards the ogre

line.dialogue: Hey!

line.stage: The ogre catches the dollar and laughs happily

line.dialogue: You know what that was? That was righteous.
Thanks, Jake. Now sniff out that book for me.
You got it!

line.stage: Finn picks up Jake and walks into the temple with him; Jake is sniffing the air
They walk into a long hallway with arms holding knives sticking out from the pillars

line.dialogue: Whoa!
Congratulations, Finn the human. You must be truly righteous to have made it this far.
Thank you.
Now! Enter my brain-world, and I will show you some aspect of yourself that you're not entirely aware of.

line.stage: Black clouds part and Finn is in a gray, misty area

line.dialogue: Where... am I?
Disembodied voice For your final trial, slay the beast!

line.stage: The Heart Beast, a giant heart with a glowing skeleton-arm, lands on the ground

line.dialogue: Why? Is it an evil beast?
Yeeeeessss. It's completely evil. Will you slay it?
Shoot, yeah. I'll slay anything that's evil. That's my deal.

line.stage: The beast attacks Finn, but Finn dodges and jumps on top of the beast
Finn punches the beast until it bursts, gushes blood, and its body falls to the ground

line.dialogue: Yeeeeessss! You've done well, hero.
Thank you.
Now! As one last, last trial... Slay this ant!
Is it evil?
No! But it's not good either. It's, uh, neutral. Will you slay it?

line.stage: Finn looks at the ant and raises his fist

line.dialogue: Slamming his fist down next to the ant No!
If you want the heroes' Enchiridion, then slay this unaligned ant!
Never. Never. Never!
Back in the real world Uh oh.

line.stage: Finn kicks the Dark Magician in the crotch and the cloak falls to the ground, red mist pouring out

line.dialogue: Dressed like a devil Congratulations, Finn the human. Now you have truly reached...
Never!

line.stage: Finn runs up and punches Key-per in the stomach

line.dialogue: Ooh!
Oh, no! Mr. Key-per! I-I'm sorry. Why are you wearing that little devil costume?
These are my pajamas. I was getting ready for bed.
Running in Finn... Jake... You made it!
Are you another trial?
Trial? Oh, no! Laughing I'm Mannish Man, the minotaur.
Gasp The manly minotaur from Princess Bubblegum's story!

line.stage: Mannish Man laughs and flexes his muscles at Finn

line.dialogue: So, can I check out the Enchiridion? Can I? Can I? Can I?
Yeah. Come on. Let's go check it out. Running off Woohoo!

line.stage: Finn, Jake, Mannish Man and Key-per are walking up to a picnic table

line.dialogue: We've been watching you guys on our magical viewing globe. Take a seat guys, have some juice. There's grape and apple and the gatekeeper made spaghetti. And... Alright, Finn. Are you ready for this?

line.stage: Mannish Man pulls out the Enchiridion and makes a small explosion noise with his mouth

line.dialogue: The Enchiridion!
Handing the book to Finn You deserve it, Finn.
Really?

Yeah, Finn. You're the goodest of heart and most righteous hero I've seen here. Tenderness, ingenuity, bravery, nard-kicking ability, and when you took that giant ogre's dollar... Laughing Oh, man! The Key-per nearly fainted!
It's true!
Laughing Hey! Crack open that book and read something for fun's sake, alright?
Oh, yeah. Opens book Whoa. How to Kiss Princesses? Giggles
Whoa. What'd you just read?
Appearing on the magical viewing globe Yeah. What does it say, Finn? Mannish Man won't tell me.
Whispering to Finn Hey. Don't tell her, Finn.
It doesn't say anything, Princess.
Annoyed Mannish Man!

line.stage: Mannish Man shrugs at Princess Bubblegum

line.dialogue: Leaping into the air Awwww... Yeah!

xml.credits: The episode ends with the Adventure Time logo appearing on the screen
